name: BARNWELL INDUSTRIES INC
summary: Barnwell Industries, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated company operating since 1956 in two segments: Oil and Natural Gas, and Land Investment. The oil and gas segment develops, produces, acquires, and sells crude oil and natural gas in Alberta, Canada (primarily the Twining field), Oklahoma, and Texas. The land investment segment holds land interests in Hawaii. The company sold its contract drilling subsidiary, Water Resources International, in March 2025.

products.name: Crude Oil Production
products.description: Oil development and production primarily in Twining, Alberta, Canada via Barnwell of Canada and Octavian Oil.

products.name: Natural Gas Production
products.description: Natural gas development and production in Alberta, Canada and previously in Oklahoma and Texas.

products.name: Land Investment
products.description: Ownership and management of land interests in the State of Hawaii.

partnerships.description: Co-operates portions of Barnwell's Twining field assets in Alberta, Canada.
